skill_description: Interacting with NPCs

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Acting in the direct interest of the NPC with no negative consequences for the NPC.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Casual interactions with no significant impact.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Ask an acquaintance for a minor favor, negotiate a small discount, or share non-sensitive information.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Make a request that a person would normally need convincing to do.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Ask for a significant personal favor or make a request that causes embarrassment or minor personal loss.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Convince a NPC to act against their own interest.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Convince a NPC to take an action that would cause them significant harm or loss.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Convince a NPC to perform an action that they are unlikely to survive.

skill_description: Using or practicing or combat with close-combat weapons (swords; axes; spears; polearms etc.)

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Successfully strike a stationary wooden training dummy with a basic overhead swing.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Land a clean hit on a slow, untrained bandit who leaves themselves open.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Hit an average city guard who is actively parrying and circling in a duel.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: hit an experienced mercenary.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Disarm or deliver a critical wound to a heavily armored knight in a prolonged fight.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Make a specifically targeted disabling attack.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Make a specifically targeted disabling attack on an aware enemy.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Hit a quickly moving and tiny target.

skill_description: Using or practicing or combat without weapons (punches; kicks; grapples; martial arts)

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Land a solid punch on a heavy training bag or stationary target.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Execute a basic combo on a slow, unskilled drunk in a tavern brawl.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Grapple and throw an average opponent who is resisting but untrained.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Win a fair, prolonged fistfight against a trained street brawler or soldier.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Knock out or submit a stronger, armored opponent with precise joint locks and strikes.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Defeat three attackers at once using advanced martial arts and environment.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Take down an armed opponent bare-handed while they have the initiative and allies nearby.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Defeat a legendary martial artist or supernatural being with only your fists in zero gravity.

skill_description: Using or practicing or combat using bows; crossbows; thrown weapons; slings or other ranged attacks

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Hit a large, stationary target (like a barn door) at close range with a bow.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Strike a man-sized target at 20 meters with a crossbow while standing still.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Hit a moving target at medium range (40m) with a bow while the target walks predictably.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Bullseye a small target (apple on a post) at long range (80m) in light wind.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Hit a dodging, zigzagging enemy from horseback at 60 meters during a chase.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Snipe a specific weak point (eye slit) on a heavily armored foe at extreme range.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Make a ricochet or trick shot to hit a hidden target around a corner to save an ally.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Hit a fly on a wall from 200 meters away during a hurricane with a thrown knife.

skill_description: Using or practicing with shields for defense; blocking and bashing

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Block a weak, telegraphed attack from a training partner with your shield.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Bash a slow opponent with your shield to stagger them and create an opening.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Hold a defensive position and block multiple strikes from one average foe.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Maintain a shield wall in formation while blocking arrows and melee from several attackers.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Shield-bash a charging, armored knight off their feet and follow up effectively.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Protect an entire group of allies from a concentrated arrow volley or spell barrage.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Single-handedly hold a narrow breach in a castle wall against overwhelming numbers.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Survive and block a direct hit from a trebuchet stone or dragon breath with your shield.

skill_description: Using in combat or practicing casting; controlling and sustaining magical spells and effects

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Cast a simple cantrip (light, minor illusion) without any chance of failure.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Maintain concentration on a basic ongoing spell (like mage armor) for several minutes.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Accurately cast a combat spell like burning hands or magic missile at a visible target.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Sustain a powerful area-of-effect spell (fireball, wall of force) while enemies attack you.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Successfully counterspell a high-level incoming spell from an enemy caster.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Cast a complex, high-level ritual spell while actively engaged in deadly combat.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Weave together multiple high-level spells simultaneously to turn the tide of a losing battle.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Rewrite the fundamental laws of magic itself to achieve a wish-level effect under extreme duress.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in physical feats of strength; acrobatics; endurance; climbing; jumping and running

dc_examples.15: Trivial: run across a flat, stable surface without any risk of falling.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Jump over a low fence (1 meter) or climb a short ladder with ease.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Dodge a slow-moving thrown object like an apple or dodge a predictable attack.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Climb a 2-meter wall with obvious handholds and footholds in normal conditions.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Dodge a fast arrow in flight or balance on a narrow 10cm beam 3 meters up.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Walk a tightrope in strong wind or climb a 10-meter overhang with few holds.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Scale a 15-meter sheer cliff face, swim upstream through dangerous rapids, or jump an 8-10 meter gap.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Perform a perfect somersault over a 3-meter (10 foot) wall or scale a 30-meter vertical wall with zero handholds.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in foraging; tracking; navigating wilderness; building shelters and enduring harsh conditions

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Identify and safely eat common edible berries or mushrooms in a familiar forest.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Build a basic lean-to shelter that keeps you dry in light rain.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Navigate to a known nearby landmark using the sun, stars, and simple landmarks.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Successfully track a large animal (deer) through moderate terrain for several hours.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Forage or hunt enough food and water for a group of 4 in a harsh but survivable wilderness for a day.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Survive a full night in a blizzard by building an insulated snow cave and maintaining body heat.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Navigate and survive alone for a week in a deadly jungle with no tools or supplies.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Thrive and remain healthy for a month in an arctic wasteland with no equipment or prior knowledge.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in hiding; moving silently; avoiding detection and ambush tactics

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Hide behind a large barrel or in deep shadows in a quiet, empty room.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Sneak past a single distracted guard who is not actively searching.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Move silently across a creaky wooden floor without alerting anyone in the next room.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Remain hidden while a small patrol actively searches the area with torches and dogs.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Pickpocket a wealthy noble in a crowded, well-lit marketplace without any suspicion.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Infiltrate a heavily guarded fortress at night, bypassing multiple patrols and traps.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Assassinate a high-profile target in broad daylight and escape completely undetected.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Remain completely undetected while surrounded by an entire army, including their mages, scouts, and magical wards.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in searching for clues; analyzing scenes; solving puzzles and noticing hidden details

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Notice an obviously dropped clue (bloody knife) in a well-lit room.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Find a hidden compartment in a desk drawer after a quick search.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Piece together basic motives and timeline from 2-3 witness statements with minor contradictions.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Solve a standard murder mystery with planted evidence, red herrings, and conflicting alibis.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Uncover a secret society’s hidden plot from scattered documents and coded messages.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Deduce the exact weakness and plan of a powerful, hidden villain from minimal clues.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Solve an ancient, legendary riddle or puzzle that has baffled scholars for centuries.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Unravel a multi-planar cosmic conspiracy that threatens the fabric of reality itself.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in misdirection; deception; persuasion; negotiation; intimidation; frightening; or inspiring others

dc_examples.15: Trivial: A merchant automatically sells you their standard product, or convince a stranger to do something in their own best interest.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Get someone to move aside, share basic directions, engage in casual small talk, or buy uncommon goods.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Ask an acquaintance for a minor favor, negotiate a small discount, or share non-sensitive information.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Conduct standard trade negotiations or request moderate help from a neutral NPC.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Ask for a significant personal favor or make a request that causes embarrassment to a stranger.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Convince someone to betray an ally, risk their life for you, or reveal a guarded secret.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Convince a sworn enemy to defect, a stranger to give up a valuable item for free or fight for you against overwhelming odds.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Hold off an army alone through words, convince an entire faction to betray its cause for a stranger, or fundamentally change someone's alignment.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in battle planning; positioning; strategy and commanding groups in combat

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Suggest a basic defensive formation for a small group of allies.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Plan a simple ambush on a small, predictable patrol.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Coordinate a basic flanking maneuver that gives your side a slight advantage in a skirmish.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Devise a solid battle plan that accounts for known enemy strengths and terrain.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Turn the tide of a losing battle through clever repositioning and use of environment.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Outmaneuver a numerically superior force using terrain, timing, and deception.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Win a war against a much larger and better-equipped army through brilliant long-term strategy.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Defeat an immortal god-king or cosmic entity through pure tactical and strategic genius alone.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in forging; repairing and improving metal weapons; armor and tools

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Repair a small dent or sharpen a dull blade on a simple metal tool.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Forge a basic, functional horseshoe or a handful of sturdy nails.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Craft a simple, reliable iron dagger or repair a broken shield boss.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Create a well-balanced, high-quality steel longsword with proper tempering.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Forge a set of masterwork plate armor pieces with intricate joint articulation.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Improve an existing legendary weapon with better balance, edge geometry, and custom engravings.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Craft a true artifact-level weapon capable of harming demons or cutting through magic.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Forge a sword that can slice through any known material (including adamantine) while ignoring all physical laws.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in carving; shaping and crafting wooden items (bows; staves; furniture; traps)

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Carve a simple wooden spoon or whittle a basic stake.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Shape a sturdy walking staff or repair a broken wooden chair leg.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Build a functional, comfortable wooden chair or small table from raw lumber.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Craft a high-quality longbow with excellent draw weight and accuracy.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Create an elaborate, spring-loaded wooden trap or complex puzzle box.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Accurately construct a large siege engine component (catapult arm) under time pressure.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Carve a breathtakingly detailed masterwork statue or a self-playing musical instrument.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Build a fully functional flying wooden ornithopter that defies gravity and carries multiple people.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in tanning; shaping and crafting leather items (armor; tools; furniture; clothing)

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Sew a simple leather patch or repair a torn belt.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Tan and shape a basic leather belt or small pouch.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Craft a set of basic leather armor pieces (bracers, greaves) that fit well.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Create a complete suit of well-fitted, durable leather armor with proper reinforcement.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Make a masterwork saddle or intricate tooled leather armor with artistic designs.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Design and craft waterproof, insulated clothing that protects against extreme cold or heat.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Craft legendary dragonhide armor from rare materials that grants significant magical resistance.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Create leather items that grant true supernatural abilities (invisibility, flight, or regeneration).

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in brewing potions; poisons; explosives and magical concoctions

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Brew a basic herbal tea or simple salve that soothes minor aches.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Mix a weak smoke bomb, basic poison, or mild healing draught.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Create a standard healing potion that restores a moderate amount of health.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Brew a powerful explosive flask or a strong antidote to common poisons.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Synthesize a potion that grants temporary superhuman strength or invisibility for minutes.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Distill a rare elixir that cures a magical or otherwise incurable disease.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Create a philosopher’s stone-like substance that can transmute metals or extend life significantly.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Brew a potion that grants true immortality, godlike power, or the ability to rewrite reality.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in imbuing items with magical effects; runes and enchantments

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Imbue a simple item with a faint glow or minor warmth effect.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Add a basic durability or sharpness rune to a tool or weapon.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Enchant a weapon with a minor combat bonus (+1 to hit or damage).
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Create a cloak or ring that provides moderate concealment or minor magical protection.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Imbue a full suit of armor with strong elemental resistance (fire, cold, or lightning).
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Craft a ring or amulet that allows limited teleportation or flight for short distances.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Enchant an item with powerful reality-warping effects (time stop, wish-like magic).
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Create a true artifact capable of granting wishes, raising the dead, or fundamentally altering fate and reality.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in healing wounds; treating illnesses; applying first aid and using herbs

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Apply basic first aid to stop minor bleeding and clean a small wound.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Treat a minor sprain, common cold, or small infection with known herbs.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Properly set a broken bone, stitch a deep wound, or cure a moderate fever.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Perform field surgery to remove an arrow, treat internal bleeding, or save someone from severe trauma.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Heal life-threatening injuries or neutralize a rare, fast-acting poison in time.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: identigy an unknown disease, perform a complex organ transplant, or revive someone from clinical death.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Re-attach a severed limb.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Bring a person back from the absolute brink of death against all medical odds.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in calming; training; riding and communicating with animals and beasts

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Calm a friendly, well-trained dog or horse with a soothing voice and touch.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Train a pet to perform a simple trick like 'sit' or 'fetch' reliably.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Ride a calm horse at a trot or canter without falling off.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Train a falcon to hunt on command or teach a guard dog advanced protection behaviors.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Calm, befriend, and eventually ride a wild or aggressive large beast.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Control and fight from the back of a wild, exotic, and intelligent mount like a griffin in battle.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Command a pack of wolves or a herd of wild horses to attack or defend against a superior force.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Befriend, tame, and ride an aggressive legendary creature like a phoenix, dragon, or ancient spirit beast.

skill_description: Exercising or practicing skill in thievery; lockpicking; or sleight of hand tricks

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Palm a small coin or hide a tiny object in your hand unnoticed by casual observers.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Pick a simple padlock or basic chest lock with improvised tools.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Steal a small pouch or wallet from a distracted merchant in a busy street.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Pick a complex, high-quality lock or plant incriminating evidence without detection.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Cheat convincingly at high-stakes cards or dice in a room full of suspicious professionals.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Infiltrate a heavily secured vault, swap a real gem with a fake, and escape undetected.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Steal the crown jewels from the most guarded vault in the kingdom during a royal ceremony.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Pickpocket a god, swap an item in another dimension, or steal the moon itself.

skill_description: Skill in researching lore; finding clues through study; and developing/experimenting with new spells

dc_examples.15: Trivial: Recall basic, well-known facts from a book or scroll you have studied before.
dc_examples.25: Very Easy: Locate specific information in a small, organized library or archive.
dc_examples.35: Easy: Adapt known information in new ways, such as adapting a spell.
dc_examples.50: Neutral: Conduct effective research in a large and well stocked library.
dc_examples.60: Difficult: Develop new information through research and experimentation.
dc_examples.65: Very Difficult: Develop a revolutionary new theory that challenges established magical or scientific dogma.
dc_examples.80: Improbable: Invent a groundbreaking discovery (new school of magic, powerful artifact formula) that changes the world.
dc_examples.100: Impossible: Unlock the ultimate secrets of the cosmos, the nature of magic itself, or create an entirely new form of existence.
